race.comment: ZAVEGA (13) started this prep with a win two runs ago. Fair effort last time out when prominent at the turn before winding up in fourth over 1100m at Ipswich, beaten a length. Peaking now and looks the one to beat from the favourable inside alley. IRISH JIG (3) finished out of the money but was not too far away when resuming last start over 1200m at Quirindi. Has a high cruising speed and will give them something to catch. IMPERIAL STATE (4) turned in a nice effort second-up when finishing in the placings over this trip at Quirindi. Nearing his peak now and rates among the main chances. EXOFLOW (10) should be hitting his straps fourth-up and is one to keep in mind.
